title: HandLib
description: Library mod for Hand-Shaker and other IceVallish mods
body:
## HandShaker Library

---

**Library mod for HandShaker (fabric/neoforge) mod for cross-version support**

---

Nothing special, just a library mod for [Hand Shaker Mod](https://modrinth.com/plugin/hand-shaker) for Neoforge and Fabric server to maintain simpler fix between minecraft versions by moving problematic part to standalone library
